---
title: "Population Exposure over Time"
toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

{{< include _pop_setup.qmd >}}

```{r pop_over_time, fig.height = 4, fig.width = 8}
pop <- read_csv(here('data/processed/pop_affected.csv')) %>%
  rename(
    wildfire_year = year,
    `Population Affected` = exposed_10km,
    usfs_region = region
  ) %>%
  select(-ID_hazard)

ggplot(data = pop) +
  geom_col(
    aes(
      x = wildfire_year,
      y = `Population Affected`,
      fill = usfs_region
    ),
    width = 1,
    linewidth = 0.25,
    color = 'grey25'
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Region", values = region_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(2000, 2024, by = 2),
    expand = expansion(add = c(0, 1.5))
  ) +
  #    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(2000, 2025)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  xlab(NULL) +
  ylab(NULL) +
  pop_theme +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = 'grey75'),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_line(color = 'grey90'),
    legend.position = 'right',
    plot.margin = unit(c(1, 5, 1, 5), "cm"),
  )

ggsave(here('figures/pop_over_time.pdf'), last_plot(), width = 8, height = 4)
```
